creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Deviating from upstream defaults would increase maintenance burden (e.g., bug 232729). And xatracker builds fine on
11.2 aarch64: https://ptpb.pw/JzOm
11.2 armv6:   https://ptpb.pw/KUtB

I thought testing build on those before landing is obvious. poudriere + qemu-user-static + native-xtools made cross-compilation easy, so ports/ committers have no good excuse to skip some non-x86 archs.
